name: HDFC Tech / Cognizant / Infosys — Enterprise Prep

hook.what_you_will_build: HDFC Tech / Cognizant / Infosys — Enterprise Prep

key_takeaways: Enterprise interviews: more emphasis on design patterns, SOLID, OOP
HDFC Tech: banking domain, legacy modernization, Java Spring Boot focus
CTS/Infosys/TCS: case studies, estimation, system design at enterprise scale
Java Spring ecosystem: Spring Boot, Spring Security, Spring Data JPA — know well
Banking domain: account management, transaction processing, interest calculation, reconciliation
Code quality: clean code, SOLID principles, design patterns — evaluated more heavily in enterprise rounds
